title: Output schema of Turkish Auto Price Tracker
description: This actor stores PRICE_RECORD, PRICE_SUMMARY, and RUN_SUMMARY records in the default dataset.

priceSummaries.title: Price summaries
priceSummaries.description: Aggregated valuation summaries for each requested vehicle spec, including averages, medians, percentiles, platform breakdowns, and seller-type analysis.

priceRecords.title: Price records
priceRecords.description: Listing-level PRICE_RECORD rows collected from the selected marketplaces for each requested vehicle spec.

runSummary.title: Run summary
runSummary.description: RUN_SUMMARY dataset row with total vehicle specs processed, total price records collected, platform counts, timing, and warnings.
